---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# library

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(PCSF)
source("R/helper.R")
source("R/kinograte_PG.R")

load("data/ppi_network/ppi_network_human_v12.rda")
# ppi_networkv12_kin <- load("data/ppi_networkv12_kin.rda")

rpws <- read_delim("data/ReactomePathways.txt", col_names = c('pathway_id', 'pathway_name', "organism")) %>% filter(organism == "Homo sapiens")

rpwrel <- read_delim("data/ReactomePathwaysRelation.txt", col_names = c("parent", "child"))
```


# UKA input

```{r}

input_folder <- "uka/180377"

uka <- list.files(input_folder, ".csv", recursive = T, full.names = T) %>% lapply(read_csv) %>% bind_rows() %>% dplyr::rename(Sgroup_contrast = SG_contrast)
unique(uka$SG_contrast)

my_contrasts <- c('C_SG2 vs SG1', "T05_SG2 vs SG1")

uka <- uka %>% 
  filter(Sgroup_contrast %in% my_contrasts) 

from_vals = unique(uka$Sgroup_contrast)
from_vals
to_vals <- c("Basal", "Activated")
from_vals
to_vals

uka <- uka %>% 
  mutate(Sgroup_contrast = plyr::mapvalues(Sgroup_contrast, 
                                           from = from_vals,
                                           to = to_vals))

uka_syms <- rlang::syms(c("uka")) 


```



# Run kinase

```{r}
source("R/helper_only_kinase_paralell.R")
source("R/kinograte_PG_only_kinase.R")
source("R/kinograte_PG_core.R")
source("R/network_enrichment_and_vis.R")
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)


result_path <- paste0("results3/",  sub(".*\\/", "", input_folder))

if (!file.exists(result_path)) {
  dir.create(result_path, recursive = T)
}

params <- list(
  spec_cutoff = 0.7, # sensitivity score
  respath = result_path,
  perc_cutoffs = c(0.01), # c(0.9, 0.7, 0.5, 0.3)
  rank_uka_abs = T,
  b = 2,
  cs = F,
  highlight_degree = 5,
  art_nodes = NULL, # c("BTK")
  art_lfc = NULL
)

for (uka_sym in uka_syms) {
  params_run <- capture_params(
    !!!params,
    uka = !!uka_sym,
    ppi_network = !!rlang::sym('ppi_networkv12')
  )
  
  do.call(plot_cell_networks_kinase, params_run)
}




plot_kinase_pathway_heatmaps(paste0(result_path, '/180377_Network_pws'))


```









# THIS DOES NOT YET WORK! #

# Run kinase + sensitivity

```{r}
source("R/helper.R")
source("R/kinograte_PG.R")
source("R/network_enrichment_and_vis.R")

sens_med <- read_csv("data/Sensitivity/sensitivity_median_stk_cells.csv")

result_path <- "results/Network"

if (!file.exists(result_path)) {
  dir.create(result_path)
}

params <- list(
  spec_cutoff = 1,
  control = "RL",
  respath = result_path,
  perc_cutoffs = c(0.7), # c(0.9, 0.7, 0.5, 0.3)
  rank_uka_abs = T,
  b = 2,
  cs = F,
  wp_ontology_names = c("classic metabolic pathway", "signaling pathway", "regulatory pathway"),
  highlight_degree = 5
)



for (uka_sym in uka_syms) {
  params_run <- capture_params(
    !!!params,
    uka = !!uka_sym,
    sens = !!rlang::sym("sens_med"),
    ppi_network = !!rlang::sym('ppi_networkv12')
  )
  
  do.call(plot_cell_networks, params_run)
}


```

# Make network of 1 pw

```{r}
source("R/kinograte_PG.R")
source("R/kinograte_PG_core.R")
source("R/network_enrichment_and_vis.R")

db <- read_csv("data/250727_86312_86402_86412_87102_87202_UpstreamDb_to_share.csv")
slk <- read_csv("data/Signalink_Protein_to_Pathway.csv")

wnt_kin <- slk_kin_pw1 %>% filter(str_detect(pathways, "WNT"))
write_csv(wnt_kin, "results/Network/Signalink_WNT_pathway_kinases_in_UKAdb.csv")
wnt <- slk %>% filter(str_detect(pathways, "WNT"))



db_wnt <- db %>% filter(Kinase_Name %in% wnt$name)
write_csv(db_wnt, "results/Network/ukadb_SignaLink_WNT_kinases.csv")

make_ukadb_net_pws(ukadb = db_wnt, ppi_network = ppi_networkv12, slk = slk, res.path = "results/Network/ukadb_wnt")


```

# Generate a small network from uka kinases input

Using all kinases from ukadb as input, network is created. Then, from the nodes of this network an augmented network is created by filtering for interaction cost and including 1 or 2 more steps.

```{r}

load("data/PamGene/250727_86312_86402_86412_87102_87202_UpstreamDb.Rdata")
load("data/ppi_network/ppi_network_human_v12.rda")
full_net <- graph_from_data_frame(
  d = ppi_networkv12,          # Your dataframe of edges
  directed = FALSE,          # Usually PPI networks are undirected
  vertices = NULL            # Use NULL unless you have a separate node list
)


kins_to_kinograte <- UpstreamDatabase %>% ungroup() %>% distinct(Kinase_Name) %>%
  dplyr::rename(name = Kinase_Name) %>%
  mutate(LogFC = 1, type = "Kinase", prize = 10)

sumdf <- kins_to_kinograte %>% group_by(type) %>% summarize(n_nodes = n())
print(sumdf) 


# 2. Make network
kinograte_res <- kinograte_pg(df = kins_to_kinograte, ppi_network = ppi_networkv12, 
                              perc_cutoff = 0,
                              res.path = "data", condition = "uka",
                              cluster = T)
a = kinograte_res$nodes
ppi_networkv12_502_kins <- ppi_networkv12 %>% filter(head %in% a$Protein | tail %in% a$Protein)
save(ppi_networkv12_502_kins, file = "data/ppi_networkv12_kin.rda")

missing <- read_csv("data/missing_nodes_uka_p0.csv")
missing$name
missing$name %in% ppi_networkv12$head | missing$name %in% ppi_networkv12$tail

subnet1 <- augment_by_threshold_steps(kinograte_res$network, full_net, cost_threshold = 0.2, steps = 2)

ppi_networkv12_kin_2step_cost0.2 <- igraph::as_data_frame(subnet1, what = "edges") %>%
  dplyr::rename(head = from, tail = to)
nodes_subnet <- igraph::as_data_frame(subnet1, what = "vertices")

sum(unique(UpstreamDatabase$Kinase_Name) %in% nodes_subnet$name)
setdiff(UpstreamDatabase$Kinase_Name, nodes_subnet$name)

write_csv(ppi_networkv12_kin_2step_cost0.2, "data/ppi_networkv12_kin_2step_cost0.2.csv")
save(ppi_networkv12_kin_2step_cost0.2, file = "data/ppi_networkv12_kin_2step_cost0.2.rda")


subnet2 <- augment_by_threshold_steps(kinograte_res$network, full_net, cost_threshold = 0.5, steps = 1)

ppi_networkv12_kin_1step_cost0.5 <- igraph::as_data_frame(subnet2, what = "edges") %>%
  dplyr::rename(head = from, tail = to)
nodes_subnet <- igraph::as_data_frame(subnet2, what = "vertices")

sum(unique(UpstreamDatabase$Kinase_Name) %in% nodes_subnet$name)
setdiff(UpstreamDatabase$Kinase_Name, nodes_subnet$name)

write_csv(ppi_networkv12_kin_1step_cost0.5, "data/ppi_networkv12_kin_1step_cost0.5.csv")
save(ppi_networkv12_kin_1step_cost0.5, file = "data/ppi_networkv12_kin_1step_cost0.5.rda")

```



# Download reactome

```{r}
# download.file(
#   "https://reactome.org/download/current/ReactomePathways.txt",
#   destfile = "data/ReactomePathways.txt",
#   mode = "wb"
# )
# 
# download.file(
#   "https://reactome.org/download/current/ReactomePathwaysRelation.txt",
#   destfile = "data/ReactomePathwaysRelation.txt",
#   mode = "wb"
# )


```
